name: chaos-decision-center
description: Human-facing VS Code UI for the CHAOS Interaction Runtime: inspect pending decisions and write validated responses to the file-backed runtime.

chaosDecisionCenter.interactionsRoot.description: Runtime storage root, relative to the workspace folder (or absolute).

chaosDecisionCenter.schemaDir.description: Schema directory, relative to the workspace folder (or absolute).

chaosDecisionCenter.openOnPendingDecisio.description: Open the Decision Center when a pending decision appears.

chaosDecisionCenter.focusOnPendingDecisi.description: Steal editor focus when a pending decision appears (off by default to avoid disruption).

chaosDecisionCenter.showNotificationOnPe.description: Show an information notification when a pending decision appears.

chaosDecisionCenter.afterSubmit.description: What the panel does after a decision is answered.

chaosDecisionCenter.validateResponses.description: Validate responses against the runtime schemas on write.

chaosDecisionCenter.pollingFallbackMs.description: Polling fallback interval (ms) in case file watching misses events. 0 disables polling.

chaosDecisionCenter.maxHistoryItems.description: Maximum number of history items to show.

chaosDecisionCenter.userName.description: Name recorded as selectedBy on responses. Avoid using an email address.
